message:
fix: redundant clone in aggregator.rs PathSet test + restore budget tests

- Remove redundant .clone() on last use of `tied` in select_paths test
  (clippy::redundant_clone)
- Restore wasm_bundle_size_budget_contract.rs to 24 self-contained tests
  that validate against artifacts/wasm_bundle_size_budget_v1.json
